query: UPDATE dbo.Customer SET Name = 'A' WHERE Id = 1
insert into #temp1 select * FROM dbo.Customer; delete from dbo.customers
insert into #temp1 select * FROM dbo.Customer; delete from dbo.customers where id in (select id from #temp1)
WITH cte AS (SELECT Id FROM dbo.JobQueue WHERE Status = 'Ready') UPDATE stage.example SET Status = 'Running' WHERE Id IN (SELECT TOP (10) Id FROM cte ORDER BY Id);
